# Conclusion


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_186f9f0d8309", "created_at": "2026-07-18T01:39:04+00:00", "title": "Executive summary", "pinned": true, "pinned_at": "2026-07-18T01:39:09+00:00"}
-->
Exact Table 1 reproduction remains blocked because the public release lacks the trained Qwen2.5-7B agent, evaluator, prompts, and trajectories; Claim 1 is therefore source-confirmed only. Fresh T4 execution gives PARTIAL/PROXY support for Claims 2 and 4: 120 executable actions produced 2,280 fits, a nine-task ranker reached 0.897953 mean accuracy across ten held-out multimodal tasks versus 0.848451 for random action choice, and maximin diversity exceeded all 5,000 random subsets. Five full-data A10G CIFAR-10 runs measured 86.69% mean and 86.80% best, but Claim 3 remains a disclosed CNN proxy rather than an ML-Agent rerun. Claim 5 is directly reproduced at the reward-rule level with real error, corner, and improvement outcomes, while the missing author implementation prevents training-level confirmation.

## Scope & cost

|  | This reproduction | Full replication |
|---|---|---|
| Scope | 120 executable actions; exactly 9 training and 10 held-out image/text/tabular tasks; 2,280 fits; 5 full CIFAR-10 seeds; all v1 reward branches | Qwen2.5-7B exploration-enriched fine-tuning and step-wise RL on the original MLAgentBench/MLE-bench environments; matched DeepSeek-R1/GPT agent baselines |
| Hardware | 1× NVIDIA T4 for the scaled suite; 1× NVIDIA A10G for CIFAR-10 | Multi-GPU training/inference plus closed-model APIs |
| Compute time | 243 s T4 job; 3,881 s A10G job; 4,124 s successful GPU runtime total | Not sufficiently disclosed for an exact estimate |
| Cost | Approximately USD 1.11 for successful GPU jobs; failed/cancelled setup attempts are documented but excluded from this estimate | Unknown and materially higher |
| Outcome | Claim 1 blocked; Claims 2–4 partial/proxy; Claim 5 reward mapping reproduced; no headline model-performance confirmation | Requires the unreleased checkpoint, evaluator, exact task harness, prompts, trajectories, and seeds |


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "figure", "id": "cell_a572a4b0cc9b", "created_at": "2026-07-18T01:41:23+00:00", "title": "Reproduction poster", "pinned": true, "pinned_at": "2026-07-18T01:41:23+00:00"}
-->
````html

1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.14);color:#6faaa4;cursor:pointer;opacity:.68}.trackio-poster-hotspot::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:clamp(44px,5vw,60px);aspect-ratio:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)}.trackio-poster-hotspot <button class="trackio-poster-hotspot" style="left:74.9631%;top:27.3478%" aria-label="Open details for Claim four result" onclick="parent.postMessage({type:'trackio-logbook:navigate',target:'claim-4-behaviorally-distant-exploration'}, '*')"><svg fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 32 32" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true"><g id="SVGRepo_bgCarrier" stroke-width="0"></g><g id="SVGRepo_tracerCarrier" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></g><g id="SVGRepo_iconCarrier"><title>chain</title><path d="M0 22.944q0 2.464 1.76 4.224l3.072 3.104q1.76 1.728 4.224 1.728t4.256-1.728l2.688-2.976q1.376-1.344 1.664-3.232t-0.512-3.552l-6.784 6.784q-0.576 0.576-1.408 0.576t-1.44-0.576l-2.816-2.816q-0.576-0.608-0.576-1.408t0.576-1.408l6.784-6.816q-1.632-0.8-3.52-0.512t-3.264 1.664l-2.944 2.72q-1.76 1.76-1.76 4.224zM9.792 20.256q0 0.832 0.576 1.408t1.408 0.576 1.408-0.576l8.48-8.48q0.576-0.576 0.576-1.408t-0.576-1.408q-0.608-0.576-1.44-0.576t-1.408 0.576l-8.448 8.48q-0.576 0.576-0.576 1.408zM14.336 7.968q-0.288 1.888 0.512 3.552l6.816-6.816q0.576-0.576 1.408-0.576t1.408 0.576l2.816 2.848q0.576 0.576 0.576 1.408t-0.576 1.408l-6.784 6.784q1.632 0.832 3.52 0.512t3.264-1.664l2.944-2.944q1.76-1.76 1.76-4.224t-1.76-4.256l-2.816-2.816q-1.76-1.76-4.224-1.76t-4.256 1.76l-2.944 2.944q-1.344 1.376-1.664 3.264z"></path></g></svg></button>

````


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "code", "id": "cell_54c998aa1c3c", "created_at": "2026-07-18T01:42:37+00:00", "title": "Publish verified reproduction bundle", "command": ["uv", "run", "scripts/log_bundle.py"], "exit_code": 0, "duration_s": 1.224}
-->
````bash
$ uv run scripts/log_bundle.py
````

exit 0 · 1.2s


````python title=log_bundle.py
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Publish the compact v2 reproduction bundle as a Trackio artifact."""

from pathlib import Path

import trackio


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
BUNDLE = ROOT / "artifact_bundle"


def main() -> None:
    trackio.init(
        project="ml-agent-repro-17897-v2-artifacts",
        name="verified-reproduction-bundle",
        config={
            "paper": "2505.23723",
            "openreview": "kcPPWaoegr",
            "official_commit": "15932e7525deb99d59f7416bbe8c75077cff3690",
            "t4_job": "6a5a89c6bee6ee1cf4ecddc5",
            "a10g_job": "6a5a8a51bee6ee1cf4ecddcb",
            "scope": "partial reproduction with independent GPU mechanism proxies",
        },
    )
    artifact = trackio.log_artifact(
        str(BUNDLE),
        name="reproduction-bundle",
        type="dataset",
        aliases=["challenge", "latest"],
    )
    print(f"ARTIFACT_PROJECT={artifact.project}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_NAME={artifact.name}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_VERSION={artifact.version}")
    trackio.finish()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

````


````output
* Trackio project initialized: ml-agent-repro-17897-v2-artifacts
* Trackio metrics logged to: /Users/binzhang/.cache/huggingface/trackio
* View dashboard by running in your terminal:
[1m[38;5;208mtrackio show --project "ml-agent-repro-17897-v2-artifacts"[0m
* or by running in Python: trackio.show(project="ml-agent-repro-17897-v2-artifacts")
* Created new run: verified-reproduction-bundle
ARTIFACT_PROJECT=ml-agent-repro-17897-v2-artifacts
ARTIFACT_NAME=reproduction-bundle
ARTIFACT_VERSION=v0
* Run finished. Uploading logs to Trackio (please wait...)

````

-->

<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_024570b88ddd", "created_at": "2026-07-18T01:43:20+00:00", "title": "Public provenance and collection"}
-->
[T4 scaled-suite Job](https://huggingface.co/jobs/binzhango/6a5a89c6bee6ee1cf4ecddc5) · [T4 raw artifacts](https://huggingface.co/buckets/binzhango/jobs-artifacts#20260717T200004-ddae91/scaled-suite-retry) · [A10G CIFAR Job](https://huggingface.co/jobs/binzhango/6a5a8a51bee6ee1cf4ecddcb) · [A10G raw artifacts](https://huggingface.co/buckets/binzhango/jobs-artifacts#20260717T200224-7699dd/cifar-gpu-localcopy) · [Staged public datasets](https://huggingface.co/buckets/binzhango/ml-agent-repro-v2-jobs) · [Reproduction collection](https://huggingface.co/collections/binzhango/ml-agent-icml-2026-reproduction-17897-6a5838c7f600d2ce8749f4c1)
